name: gang-leader-for-a-day
description: Sudhir Venkatesh's Gang Leader for a Day — ethnographic toolkit for understanding underground economies, gang hierarchies, and survival in urban ghettos
useCase: Understand the real structure of gang economies, conduct ethical ethnographic fieldwork, and analyze how poor communities survive through underground economies
knownRisks: The book describes a specific time and place (1990s Chicago) — some patterns may not generalize to other contexts
Deep ethnographic access requires years, not months — the principles are transferrable but the time commitment is not
Ethnographic presence in dangerous environments carries real personal risk — the method itself is not safe to replicate naively
